heading: Regulations
label: 4157 Regulations
text: Under the direction of the President, the Secretary shall prescribe regulations for the implementation of this subchapter.
notes: Delegation of FunctionsAuthority of President under this section to extent necessary to implement provisions of , relating to pay and benefits pending conversion, delegated to Secretary of State, see section 5 of Ex.
